seoTitle: Redmond vs Redmond West — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Redmond and Redmond West. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Redmond vs Redmond West: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Redmond and Redmond West.
heading: Redmond vs Redmond West — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Redmond, Western Australia and Redmond West, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Redmond West has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Redmond (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Redmond or Redmond West safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Redmond has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Redmond West scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Redmond scores 29/100 for bushfire risk. Redmond West scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Redmond or Redmond West?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Redmond West has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.78% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
